The optimal column gives the expected smooth-solution rates used here as velocity/pressure; \(-/-\) denotes element pairs for which no optimal-rate claim is made here. Observed entries are least-squares slopes fitted to \(\log E\) versus \(\log h\) and are reported as \(E^{\mathrm{rel}}_{L_2}(\mathbf{u})/E^{\mathrm{rel}}_{L_2}(p)\).}
\label{tab:observed_convergence_rates}
